heading: Foreign letters out of the mails
label: 602 Foreign letters out of the mails
notes: Effective DateSection effective , pursuant to Resolution No. 71–9 of the Board of Governors. See , set out as a note preceding .July 1, 1971section 15(a) of Pub. L. 91–375section 101 of this title

children.text: has not been regularly received from a United States post office; or
does not relate to the cargo of the vessel.

children.label: b
children.text: The officer of the port empowered to grant clearances shall require from the master of such a vessel, as a condition of clearance, an oath that he does not have under his care or control, and will not receive or transport, any letter contrary to the provisions of this section.

children.label: c
children.text: Except as provided in , the master of a vessel arriving at a port of the United States carrying letters not regularly in the mails shall deposit them in the post office at the port of arrival.section 1699 of title 18
